# Lumacaftor 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lumacaftor 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lumacaftor</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lumacaftor 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Orkambi tablets are indicated for the treatment of cystic fibrosis (CF) in patients aged 6 years and older who are homozygous for the F508del mutation in the CFTR gene. Orkambi granules are indicated...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>leprosy（99.4%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（98.8%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.7%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.7%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.5%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.4%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.2%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（98.0%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（97.9%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（97.8%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（97.5%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（97.1%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（96.9%）</li>
<li>persistent Mullerian duct syndrome（96.7%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（96.6%）</li>
<li>pneumocystosis（96.5%）</li>
<li>hypoalphalipoproteinemia（96.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
